## Usage Documentation for CalendarClone Card

### Summary
The `CalendarClone` card is an extension of the `Calendar` card that provides a simplified calendar interface with the ability to create new events.

### Import
```javascript
import { CalendarClone } from '../calendar-clone';
```

### Usage as a Field
To use the `CalendarClone` card as a field within a consuming card or field, you can add the following:

```javascript
@field calendar = linksTo(CalendarClone);
```

This will add a calendar field to your card that displays the `CalendarClone` component.

### Template Usage
Inside your consuming card or field template, you can display the `CalendarClone` component like this:

```handlebars
<@fields.calendar @format="isolated" />
```

This will render the `CalendarClone` component in the isolated format, showing the full calendar view.
